Regularize signal data to an evenly spaced time grid

Source: R/signal-dropout-preprocessing.R
upsample_gazepoint_data.Rd

Uses stats::approx() to interpolate selected numeric signals onto a regular time grid within each group. The function records an interpolation log and does not extrapolate beyond the observed time range.

Usage

upsample_gazepoint_data(
  data,
  time_col,
  signal_cols = NULL,
  group_cols = NULL,
  interval = NULL,
  method = c("linear", "constant")
)

Arguments

data

A data frame.

time_col

Numeric time column.

signal_cols

Optional character vector of numeric signal columns. If NULL, all numeric columns except grouping and time columns are used.

group_cols

Optional grouping columns.

interval

Numeric interval for the output time grid, in the same units as time_col. If NULL, the median positive time difference is used within each group.

method

Interpolation method passed to stats::approx(): "linear" or "constant".

Value

A data frame with class gazepoint_upsampled_data.
